creator: tomasz.sowinski@nucleus.malbork.pl
text:
I can not fetch package for FreeBSD 14 using pkg-1.20.6

root@mail:/usr/ports/security # pkg install py-certbot > /tmp/result

pkg: An error occured while fetching package
pkg: Impossible to get the value from Last-Modified HTTP header
pkg: An error occured while fetching package
pkg: Impossible to get the value from Last-Modified HTTP header
pkg: An error occured while fetching package
pkg: Impossible to get the value from Last-Modified HTTP header
